title: moraea brevistyla subsp. brevistyla
intro: Moraea brevistyla subsp. brevistyla is a plant species also known as the 'narrow-styled Cape moraea', which belongs to the family Iridaceae. The medicinal properties of Moraea brevistyla subsp. brevistyla include its ability to be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Moraea brevistyla subsp. brevistyla can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
